violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the the soda syrup rack, counters beneath coffee machine and espresso machine, espresso refrigerator, reach in, and HLZ have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the counter between the soda machines and wall have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The floors (especially in hard to reach areas) throughout the facility AND wall under soda machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Dishes were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Ham and eggs were observed held at 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in freezer for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Chemical spray bottle was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC removed chemical bottle from prep area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. PIC removed and talked with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
2 door freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets under self-service soda machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Walk-in freezer and 2 door freezer was observed with a heavy accumulation of ice. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Inspector observed a hand-washing sink in the back kitchen area to be in poor repair (no water). PIC removed automatic sensor during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The floors throughout the facility (particularly behind equipment) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets for 2 stack drawer and lowboy were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. ice machine (black residue) 2. shelf in cabinet below self service soda dispensers New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
Several ceiling tiles by the office were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
